title.zh: AI Agent 工程师 | Harness Engineering 实践者
title.en: AI Agent Engineer | Harness Engineering Practitioner

zh: 从 Prompt → Context → Harness Engineering 演进，致力于构建全自动 AI Agent 团队
独立设计 V1→V4 AI Agent 架构演进，准确率从 70% 提升至 90%+
构建 OpenMemory Plus 双层记忆框架，支持 4+ IDE Agent 跨会话记忆共享
从 0 到 1 独立完成攀岩 iOS 应用全流程：产品/UI/前后端/AI 模型/DevOps
自研 MCP Server（25 个运维工具）实现 AI Agent 自主控制生产服务器
en: Evolved through Prompt → Context → Harness Engineering, building fully autonomous AI agent teams
Independently designed V1→V4 AI Agent architecture, accuracy improved from 70% to 90%+
Built OpenMemory Plus dual-layer memory framework, cross-session memory sharing for 4+ IDE Agents
Built climbing iOS app from 0 to 1: Product/UI/Full-stack/AI Model/DevOps
Built custom MCP Server (25 ops tools) enabling AI agents to control production servers autonomously

languages.en: 流利 - 日常工作无障碍
